problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power may resolve Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear by activating at the systems level.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
